name: openclaw-agent-railway-main-wrapper
description: Railway compatibility wrapper when Root Directory is accidentally set to main.

scripts.start: NODE_PATH=./node_modules node scripts/ensure-git-workdir.js && NODE_PATH=./node_modules node router-v2.js
scripts.check: NODE_PATH=./node_modules node --check router-v2.js && NODE_PATH=./node_modules node --check meta-agent-v2.js && NODE_PATH=./node_modules node --check sub-agents/memory.js && NODE_PATH=./node_modules node --check sub-agents/auto-worker.js
